data.name: Succupie: An Erotic Short Story
data.detailed_description:
Succupie: An Erotic Short Story is a pornographic short-form, first-person tale about depression, pizza, and a horny demonic delivery girl.

A Sexy, Supernatural Slice-of-life Story

Step into the shoes of a dejected, reclusive 20-something year old in the mid 90s, who strikes up an unlikely 'situationship' with Marcine, a demonic (and very horny) pizza delivery girl. Taking place over a week, Succupie takes you on a supernatural journey through 90s nostalgia, public access TV, and of course, spontaneous hardcore sex.

Meet (and Fuck) Marcine: the Pizza Delivery Succubus

Get to know the peppy delivery girl Marcine through heartfelt, humorous conversations about modern life, culture, and whether or not pineapple really belongs on pizza. And then get to know her even better by experiencing fully animated POV sex scenes!

Hand crafted, Retro 3D Visuals

Every old pizza box, discarded sock, and lewd poster in your apartment is modelled, textured, and drawn by hand to create a distinct, cozy aesthetic that pays homage to early 3D graphics. There's just enough polygons to put curves in all the right places - and hand-animated bouncing too!

Trash TV, Talk-Radio & Videogames

Catch public-access sock-puppet television, listen to bizarre late night radio stations and enjoy the fully playable "Greenman VS Dommy Mommy Aliens" on the DreamStation 64! With collectible lewd trading cards to find, there's plenty to discover just hanging out in your apartment - you're sure to be in for an exciting week!

data.short_description: Succupie: An Erotic Short Story is a short, first-person slice-of-life tale about depression, demon girls and pizza! Step into the shoes of a dejected, reclusive 20-something year old in the mid 90s, who strikes up an unlikely 'situationship' with Marcine, a demonic pizza delivery girl.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit or Windows 11 64-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor with a clock speed of 2.5 GHz or more
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce 960 GTX or higher
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit or Windows 11 64-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor with a clock speed of 2.5 GHz or more
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce 960 GTX or higher
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
